events.name: collectible_picked
events.description: Fired when a collectible is picked up by an entity.

events.name: damage_applied
events.description: Fired when damage is dealt to an entity.

events.name: dialogue_choice
events.description: Fired when a player selects a dialogue choice.

events.name: dialogue_started
events.description: Fired when a dialogue sequence begins.

events.name: died
events.description: Fired when an entity's health reaches zero.

events.name: entered_zone
events.description: Fired when an entity enters a trigger zone.

events.name: room_entered
events.description: Fired when the player enters a room trigger (e.g., puzzle room).

events.name: hint_read
events.description: Fired when a player reads a hint or plaque.

events.name: puzzle_progress
events.description: Fired when a puzzle sequence advances.

events.name: puzzle_wrong
events.description: Fired when a puzzle sequence is entered incorrectly.

events.name: puzzle_reset
events.description: Fired when a puzzle sequence is reset.

events.name: puzzle_solved
events.description: Fired when a puzzle sequence is completed.

events.name: quest_room_complete
events.description: Fired when the puzzle room quest completes.

events.name: room2_entered
events.description: Fired when the player enters the Puzzle Room 02 trigger.

events.name: room2_started
events.description: Fired when the Puzzle Room 02 timer starts.

events.name: hint2_plaque_interact
events.description: Fired when the Puzzle Room 02 hint plaque is interacted with.

events.name: hint2_read
events.description: Fired when the Puzzle Room 02 hint is read.

events.name: puzzle2_rune_a
events.description: Fired when the Puzzle Room 02 rune A trigger is entered.

events.name: puzzle2_rune_b
events.description: Fired when the Puzzle Room 02 rune B trigger is entered.

events.name: puzzle2_rune_c
events.description: Fired when the Puzzle Room 02 rune C trigger is entered.

events.name: puzzle2_progress
events.description: Fired when the Puzzle Room 02 sequence advances.

events.name: puzzle2_wrong
events.description: Fired when the Puzzle Room 02 sequence is entered incorrectly.

events.name: puzzle2_timeout
events.description: Fired when the Puzzle Room 02 timer expires.

events.name: sentinel_spotted
events.description: Fired when the Puzzle Room 02 sentinel sees the player.

events.name: puzzle2_failed
events.description: Fired when the Puzzle Room 02 sequence fails.

events.name: puzzle2_reset
events.description: Fired when the Puzzle Room 02 sequence resets.

events.name: puzzle2_solved
events.description: Fired when the Puzzle Room 02 sequence is completed.

events.name: door2_opened
events.description: Fired when the Puzzle Room 02 exit door is opened.

events.name: quest_room2_complete
events.description: Fired when the Puzzle Room 02 quest completes.

events.name: open_shop
events.description: Fired to open the vendor UI.

events.name: quest_completed
events.description: Fired when a quest is fully completed.

events.name: quest_stage_completed
events.description: Fired when a quest stage is completed.

events.name: quest_stage_started
events.description: Fired when a quest stage becomes active.

events.name: act1_ch1_gate_unlock
events.description: Fired when the Act 1 Chapter 1 gate switch is activated.

events.name: act1_ch2_ruin_unlock
events.description: Fired when the Act 1 Chapter 2 ruined gate switch is activated.

events.name: ridge2_variant_k_unlock
events.description: Fired when the Golden Slice 2 Variant K puzzle switch is activated.

events.name: ridge2_variant_n_unlock
events.description: Fired when the Golden Slice puzzle switch for variant N2 is activated.

events.name: ridge_variant_k_unlock
events.description: Fired when the Variant K puzzle switch is activated.
